title: prenanthes subpeltata
intro: Prenanthes subpeltata, also known as Missouri ironweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. Prenanthes subpeltata is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots.
